webjs page.description: A webjs page (app/<segment>/page.ts). Default export is a server-only function returning a TemplateResult.

webjs dynamic page.description: A dynamic page reading params (app/<segment>/[id]/page.ts). Fetch via a server action/query, never the DB directly.
body: export default async function ${1:Detail}({ params }: { params: { ${2:id}: string } }) {

webjs server action.description: A server action (*.server.ts + 'use server'). Returns the ActionResult envelope; the client import becomes a typed RPC stub.
body: if (!${2:name}) return { success: false, error: '${2:name} required', status: 400 };

webjs component.description: An interactive WebComponent. Signals are the default state; the tag must contain a hyphen.

webjs route handler.description: An HTTP route handler (app/<path>/route.ts). Named exports per method.
body: export async function GET(request: Request, { params }: { params: Record<string, string> }) {

webjs layout.description: A layout (app/<segment>/layout.ts). Must embed children; only the root layout writes the html shell.
body: export default function ${1:Layout}({ children }: { children: unknown }) {
